title: American Lamb Hash
description: A hearty breakfast dish featuring lamb and a crispy hash. Perfect for a hangover cure.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add diced lamb to skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add diced hash to skillet and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
Push lamb and hash mixture to one side of the skillet.
Add a small amount of oil to the other side of the skillet and pour in beaten eggs.
Mix eggs with lamb and hash mixture.
Top with shredded American cheese and cook until melted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
